name: sf-manifest-pipeline
description: Leader workflow for Salesforce projects without a centralized repository: initialize local version control, retrieve scoped org metadata, analyze changes, and learn future retrieve scope from change history.

interface.shortDescription: Retrieve and review project-relevant Salesforce metadata for tech leaders.
interface.longDescription: Supports teams that do not share a centralized source repository. The plugin initializes local Git when needed, keeps a project-specific coding standard file, generates chunked full manifests for first use, retrieves metadata from the current org, produces change-review reports, records frequently changed metadata, and uses history to narrow future retrieve scope.
defaultPrompt: Initialize this Salesforce project for manifest pipeline review.
Generate a chunked first-use package.xml from the current org and retrieve the metadata.
Analyze the latest retrieved metadata changes against the project standards and update the change-frequency history.
